AtlasFlow System Flow

A service request can become prioritized, dispatch-ready work automatically: Request → Customer record → Cal AI → Command Center → Human decision

Service request

Customer requestMrs. Thompson reports water leaking through the ceiling below an upstairs bathroom.
Context assembledCal matches the customer record and combines the request with address, service history, and current dispatch commitments.
Priority createdCal identifies emergency risk, explains why it matters now, and recommends immediate dispatch.
Human decisionThe request appears in Command Center for Doug or dispatch to review, approve, delegate, or complete.

Automation path

Request
Customer record
Cal AI
Command Center
Human action
01 · Detect: a service request is captured—a call, form, text, or office note.
02 · Contextualize: Cal assembles the customer record, location, history, and open commitments.
03 · Prioritize: Cal determines urgency, why it matters, and the recommended next action.
04 · Surface: the request appears in Command Center with a clear reason and priority.
05 · Decide: Doug or dispatch reviews, approves, delegates, or completes the action.
Urgency

What needs immediate attention?

Risk

What could create damage, delay, or customer exposure?

Reason

Why did Cal surface this request now?

Next action

What should Doug or dispatch do next?

Product thesis

Service requests arrive messy and inconsistent, forcing dispatchers to interpret urgency, risk, and next steps manually. Cal can turn that unstructured input into clear, prioritized, dispatch-ready work while directing owner attention to the requests that matter most.

Validation question

Do Cal’s core artifacts help L.E. Isley & Sons Plumbing turn messy service requests into faster, more consistent decisions by surfacing urgent or high-risk work sooner and clarifying the right next action—without removing human control?

Operator model

This view shows how Cal routes plumbing service requests through intake, triage, review, and briefing so the office team can make informed decisions and take action.
